RUFAS.routines.manure.beddings package

Submodules

RUFAS.routines.manure.beddings.bedding_classes module

class RUFAS.routines.manure.beddings.bedding_classes.BaseBedding(bedding_config: BeddingConfig)

Bases: ABC

Base class for all bedding types.

Attributes:

bedding_mass_per_day: Amount of bedding needed for each animal per day, kg/animal/day. bedding_density: Density of the bedding, kg/m^3. bedding_dry_matter_content: Dry matter content of the bedding, [0.7 - 1.0]. bedding_cleaned_fraction: Fraction of bedding removed from the barn [0.7 - 1.0]. bedding_type: Type of bedding.

calc_total_bedding_dry_solids(num_animals: int) → float

Returns the total amount of dry solids in the bedding.

Args:

num_animals: Number of animals in the pen.

Returns:

Total amount of dry solids in the bedding, kg/day.

abstract calc_total_bedding_mass(num_animals: int) → float

Returns the total amount of bedding needed for all animals in the given pen.

Args:

num_animals: Number of animals in the pen.

Returns:

Total amount of bedding needed for all animals in the given pen, kg/day.

calc_total_bedding_volume(num_animals: int) → float

Return the total volume of bedding needed for all animals in the given pen.

Args:

num_animals: Number of animals in the pen.

Returns:

Total volume of bedding needed for all animals in the given pen, m^3/day.

calc_total_bedding_washed(num_animals: int) → float

Returns the total amount of bedding that is washed away.

Args:

num_animals: Number of animals in the pen.

Returns:

Total amount of bedding that is washed away, kg/animal/day.

class RUFAS.routines.manure.beddings.bedding_classes.BaseOrganicBedding(bedding_config: BeddingConfig)

Bases: BaseBedding

Base class for all organic bedding types.

calc_total_bedding_mass(num_animals: int) → float

Returns the total amount of bedding needed for all animals in the given pen.

Args:

num_animals: Number of animals in the pen.

Returns:

Total amount of bedding needed for all animals in the given pen, kg/day.

class RUFAS.routines.manure.beddings.bedding_classes.BeddingConfig(bedding_mass_per_day: float, bedding_density: float, bedding_dry_matter_content: float, bedding_cleaned_fraction: float, bedding_type: BeddingType, sand_removal_efficiency: float = 0.0)

Bases: object

Class for storing the configuration of a bedding.

Attributes:

bedding_mass_per_day: Amount of bedding needed for each animal per day, kg/animal/day. bedding_density: Density of the bedding, kg/m^3. bedding_dry_matter_content: Dry matter content of the bedding as a fraction of the total mass, [0.7, 1.0], dimensionless. bedding_cleaned_fraction: Percent of the bedding that is washed away, [0.7, 1.0], dimensionless. sand_removal_efficiency: Efficiency of removing sand from the bedding, [0.7, 1.0], dimensionless.

bedding_cleaned_fraction: float
bedding_density: float
bedding_dry_matter_content: float
bedding_mass_per_day: float
bedding_type: BeddingType
sand_removal_efficiency: float = 0.0
class RUFAS.routines.manure.beddings.bedding_classes.BeddingFactory

Bases: object

Class for creating bedding objects.

classmethod get_instance(bedding_type_name: str, custom_bedding_config: BeddingConfig | None = None) → BaseBedding

Return the bedding object for the given bedding type name.

Args:

bedding_type_name: Name of the bedding type. custom_bedding_config: Custom configuration of the bedding, if any.

Returns:

Bedding object for the given bedding type name.

class RUFAS.routines.manure.beddings.bedding_classes.BeddingType(value, names=None, *, module=None, qualname=None, type=None, start=1, boundary=None)

Bases: DefaultEnum

Enumerates the different types of bedding.

DEFAULT = 'sand'
MANURE_SOLIDS = 'manure solids'
SAND = 'sand'
SAWDUST = 'sawdust'
class RUFAS.routines.manure.beddings.bedding_classes.DefaultBeddingConfigFactory

Bases: object

Class for creating default bedding configurations.

MANURE_SOLIDS_BEDDING_CONFIG = BeddingConfig(bedding_mass_per_day=2.5, bedding_density=400.0, bedding_dry_matter_content=0.9, bedding_cleaned_fraction=1.0, bedding_type=<BeddingType.MANURE_SOLIDS: 'manure solids'>, sand_removal_efficiency=0.0)
SAND_BEDDING_CONFIG = BeddingConfig(bedding_mass_per_day=25.0, bedding_density=1500.0, bedding_dry_matter_content=0.9, bedding_cleaned_fraction=1.0, bedding_type=<BeddingType.SAND: 'sand'>, sand_removal_efficiency=1.0)
SAWDUST_BEDDING_CONFIG = BeddingConfig(bedding_mass_per_day=1.97, bedding_density=250.0, bedding_dry_matter_content=0.9, bedding_cleaned_fraction=1.0, bedding_type=<BeddingType.SAWDUST: 'sawdust'>, sand_removal_efficiency=0.0)
classmethod get_instance(bedding_type: BeddingType) → BeddingConfig

Return the default bedding configuration for the given bedding type.

Args:

bedding_type: Type of bedding.

Returns:

Default bedding configuration for the given bedding type.

class RUFAS.routines.manure.beddings.bedding_classes.ManureSolidsBedding(bedding_config: BeddingConfig)

Bases: BaseOrganicBedding

Class for manure solids bedding.

Attributes:

Inherited from BaseOrganicBedding.

class RUFAS.routines.manure.beddings.bedding_classes.SandBedding(bedding_config: BeddingConfig)

Bases: BaseBedding

Class for sand bedding.

Attributes:

All inherited attributes from the parent classes. In addition: sand_removal_efficiency: Efficiency of removing sand from the bedding, [0.0, 1.0], unitless.

calc_total_bedding_mass(num_animals: int) → float

Returns the total amount of bedding needed for all animals in the given pen.

Args:

num_animals: Number of animals in the pen.

Returns:

Total amount of bedding needed for all animals in the given pen, kg/day.

class RUFAS.routines.manure.beddings.bedding_classes.SawdustBedding(bedding_config: BeddingConfig)

Bases: BaseOrganicBedding

Class for sawdust bedding.

Attributes:

Inherited from BaseOrganicBedding.
